name: layeraxis-v4-2agent
description: LayerAxis V4 two-stage article illustration workflow. Reads an article, designs illustration prompts, and batch-generates images through Gemini or Codex.

interface.longDescription: LayerAxis V4 2-Agent packages a two-stage article illustration workflow for Codex: a creative planning skill writes outline and prompt specs, then a render skill generates PNGs through Gemini or Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use LayerAxis to illustrate this article.
